note: Source list is intentionally placeholder. URLs must be verified against the issuing organization's current publication before any external use.

sources.title: Electric Vehicle Availability Standard
sources.notes: Federal regulation establishing 20% by 2026 and 100% by 2035 ZEV new-sales targets for light-duty vehicles.

sources.title: Electric Charging and Alternative Fuelling Stations Locator
sources.notes: Public registry of charging stations and ports across Canada.

sources.title: EV Charging Infrastructure Gap Analysis
sources.notes: Order-of-magnitude estimate of public ports required by 2035 to support 100% ZEV sales.

sources.title: Zero Emission Vehicle Infrastructure Program
sources.notes: Federal cost-share program for charging deployment.

sources.title: Canada Infrastructure Bank — ZEV Charging Initiative
sources.notes: Long-term low-cost debt for charging networks and depot electrification.

sources.title: Smart Renewables and Electrification Pathways
sources.notes: Funding for storage, renewables, and grid-edge integration.

sources.title: Strategic Innovation Fund
sources.organization: Innovation, Science and Economic Development Canada
sources.notes: Federal program for strategic manufacturing, R&D, and innovation projects.

sources.title: EV ChargeON / Save On Energy
sources.notes: Provincial cost-share for charging in smaller communities and corridors.

sources.title: Roulez vert / Hydro-Québec EV programs
sources.notes: Provincial/utility incentives for residential and commercial charging.

sources.title: CleanBC Go Electric
sources.notes: BC incentives for public, workplace, multi-unit, and fleet charging.

sources.title: Fleet share of vehicle kilometres travelled
sources.notes: Used to scope the fleet depot opportunity.

sources.title: Home charging share of EV energy
sources.notes: Cross-market reference for residential charging share.

sources.title: Canadian surtax on Chinese-made EVs
sources.notes: 100% surtax in effect since 2024; foundational reason for infrastructure-first strategy.

sources.title: DCFC grid interconnect lead times
sources.notes: Anecdotal and operator-reported figures used for planning.
